content: I just wanted to check my email.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Volevo solo controllare la mia posta elettronica
ido:Me nur volis lektar mea elektronik-postala mesaji
pes:فقط می‌خواستم ایمیلم را چک کنم
sat:ᱤᱧ ᱠᱷᱟᱹᱞᱤ ᱤᱧᱟᱜ ᱤᱢᱮᱞ ᱧᱮᱞ ᱵᱤᱲᱟᱹᱣ ᱥᱮᱱᱟᱹᱧ ᱠᱟᱱ ᱛᱟᱦᱮᱸᱡ ᱾
